message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor LCM

participant "Class\nApplicationProperty" as AP #lightgreen
participant "Class\nDscResourceBase" as DRB #lightyellow
participant "Function\nConvertTo-HashtableFromObject" as CTHO #plum
participant "Function\nTest-DscParameterState" as TDPS #plum

LCM -> AP : ApplicationProperty.Test()
activate AP

AP -> DRB : ([DscResourceBase] $this).Test()
activate DRB

DRB -> CTHO : $this
CTHO --> DRB : Return Type: [Hashtable]

DRB -> DRB : $actual = $this.Get()

DRB -> CTHO : $actual
CTHO --> DRB : Return Type: [Hashtable]

DRB -> TDPS : Parameter: both Hashtables
note right of TDPS : DscResourceBase must determine which properties\nare optional to exclude them the comparison.
TDPS --> DRB : Return Type: [Boolean]

DRB --> AP : Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate DRB

AP --> LCM : Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate AP

@enduml
```
